datapoints.description: Pods with OOMKilled last termination reason
datapoints.name: pods_oomkilled

description: Cluster-wide pod health status counts for CrashLoopBackOff, ImagePullBackOff, OOMKilled, and more via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Single static instance. Uses count() with == 1 filter and or vector(0) fallbacks for each pod failure reason.
name: OCP_Pod_Health
